message:
🐛 fix(nodes): ring-inset so selected-state pill border isn't clipped (#7881) (#7884)

The filter pills on the Node Conditions card (All / Healthy / Cordoned /
Pressure) use `ring-1 ring-current` on the selected pill, but the parent
wrapper has `overflow-hidden` (kept for #6457 — long translated labels
were overflowing the card on narrow viewports).

Because the 1px ring is rendered *outside* the button's border-box, the
top and bottom strips of the ring were being clipped by the parent. In
xonas1101's screenshot the green "Healthy: 3" ring is visible on the
left and right but cut flush with the pill on top and bottom.

Fix: add `ring-inset` so the ring draws inside the pill's border-box.
No layout impact, no new scroll behavior, and the overflow-hidden guard
on the parent stays in place.

Fixes #7881

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
